The correct answer is based on the **Coefficient of Performance (COP)** for a reversible refrigerator, which is given by:

\[
\text{COP} = \frac{T_{\text{cold}}}{T_{\text{hot}} - T_{\text{cold}}}
\]

where temperatures are in **absolute (Kelvin) units**.

For the refrigerator:
\[
T_{\text{hot}} = 65^\circ \mathrm{F} = 290.15\,\mathrm{K}, \quad T_{\text{cold}} = 36^\circ \mathrm{F} = 279.82\,\mathrm{K}
\]
\[
\text{COP}_{\text{ref}} = \frac{279.82}{290.15 - 279.82} \approx 14.5
\]
